hotel: The Westin Washington, D.C. City Center
greeting: Welcome, Alex — your eco-conscious stay in DC is coming up, and we've tailored everything to make it seamless.
weather_summary: Expect a warm and sunny weekend in DC — highs around 28°C (82°F) with a light breeze. Perfect for exploring on foot or by bike.
packing_tips: Light layers for the evening — temperatures dip to 18°C after sunset
Comfortable walking shoes — the National Mall is best explored on foot
Reusable water bottle — the Westin has refill stations throughout the property

events.name: DC EcoFest
events.why_youll_love_it: Right up your alley — sustainability vendors, workshops, and a zero-waste marketplace on the National Mall. Free entry.

events.name: Founding Farmers Brunch
events.why_youll_love_it: DC's most celebrated farm-to-table brunch, 1.8km from the hotel. Strong vegetarian menu. Westin Serve360 partner.

events.name: Capital Bikeshare Tour
events.why_youll_love_it: A bike dock is 100m from the hotel. Day pass is $8. Best way to explore the monuments sustainably.

dining.name: Fare Well
dining.note: DC's top vegan restaurant, 4km away. Brunch on weekends is exceptional.

dining.name: Founding Farmers
dining.note: 1.8km from hotel. Westin partner. Seasonal vegetarian dishes change weekly.

dining.name: Compass Rose
dining.note: 0.9km away. Global flavors with clearly labeled vegetarian and vegan options.

transit: The Westin is 2 blocks from the McPherson Square Metro station (Blue/Orange/Silver lines). DCA airport is 20 minutes by Metro — take the Yellow line to L'Enfant Plaza, then transfer. No need for a cab.
property_note: Your room has been prepared with eco-amenity products and a reusable tote. The rooftop Westin Workout run departs daily at 6:30 AM from the lobby if you'd like to join.
eco_note: This hotel earned a 9.1 Eco Score — one of the highest in DC. Your stay earns 3,900 Bonvoy Green Points (base 3,000 + 900 eco bonus).
